programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Diane and David from north Wales have been married for 19 years and think the times now right to relocate to Spain, so are looking for their new forever home in the countryside around Almería. With a budget of £150,000, they would love a character property close to their favourite town of Arboleas. Danni Menzies shows them five options, hoping at least one will prove to be their idea of a perfect property

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in Essex and Suffolk, where the first host, 29-year-old entrepreneur Chris, plans to treat his guests - Samantha, Joanna, Mark and Claire - to a night of fine French cuisine, with the added bonus of ripped abs on display

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from Essex/Suffolk, and it is the turn of salon owner Sam to cook. She has opted for a good looking, simple menu, but foodie Chris is not impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Claire hosts the third night of the contest in Essex, and lays on a lavish East End-themed feast, but Sam may be looking for vengeance after everyone claimed her food was boring

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Essex sees Polish party girl Joanna offer a taste of her homeland in a bid to win the prize. But some of the unusual flavour combinations throw her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Essex and Suffolk, ex-policeman Mark wants to surprise his guests with some homemade favourites. Meanwhile, will there be wedding bells or tears when Chris answers Joannas earlier proposition?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the George Inn in Barton-upon-Humber, North Lincolnshire, where a relationship revelation over drinks causes waves among the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB challenge continues at Cross Farm Cottages in Holmfirth, West Yorkshire, where Claire and son Cole reckon their homely style and rural setting will pip their rivals to the post. But Alex is not impressed with the Artex, while Malaya has a firm opinion about the mattress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Malaya Nayak welcomes his rivals to the New Valron Hotel in the Lancashire seaside town of Blackpool, where he hopes a tram ride along the seafront will win him a few points

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Guest house owners visit the Spinney Homestay in Warwickshire, where Phil Harris and Maria Parker are confident their swish sense of interior design and the lakeside setting will find approval. The hosts organise a pedalo trip down the Avon, where the rivalry spills over into some raucous racing. Yet, at drinks in the evening, its another pair who decide to stick their oar in

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The holiday hosts meet one last time, to settle the scores and discover what theyve been paid. First to face the music is Pete Storey and his partner Alex Muse, owners of the George Inn in Barton-upon-Humber, Lincolnshire. After dishing out some flooring feedback, a payment leaves Phil and Maria out in the cold. Dirty discoveries, the utter lack of praise and sleep problems are all on the agenda, alongside the continental breakfast. After some dramatic discoveries and frank exchanges, the winning host is finally announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to Southampton to take on a 1969 Jensen Interceptor. Owner Nick cherished his dream car until he got extreme arthritis

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Lincolnshire where the embodiment of a once luxurious era awaits, a 1929 Rolls-Royce doctors coupe. When Emilys father died and left the car in her hands, she had no idea what to do with it and so this luxurious leviathan of a car ended up rotting away in her garage

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Deaf couple Danni and Salomon try to break through Milo the cavoodles separation anxiety, while Steve and Fiona see if theyre the right match for Bear, an abused Border collie

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th-century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but its not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take on more of the work themselves

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Italian crime drama based on the novels by Patrizia Rinaldi, starring Maria Chiara Giannetta as a blind criminal profiler. When a woman Blanca meets in passing is killed, she is unconvinced by the cops tidy theory that Margheritas husband is the killer, or that the victim died in the same place where her body was found. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Steven is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham with multiple life-threatening injuries to his head, eye and chest after a 22-foot wall collapsed on him. Teenager Coby has crashed his motocross bike at speed, and seven-year-old Layla-Rose has fallen off her bike and smashed her front teeth

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham are concerned that an 80-year-old man who fell out of bed and hurt his head may have incurred brain injuries. Other patients include a 22-year-old professional carer who has been brought into AandE after collapsing at work and a man who trapped his finger in a container. Plus, nurse Jess talks about her stammer

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A womans face is visibly drooped on one side, and she cant raise her arm. The paramedics suspect she may be having a stroke - a time-critical emergency. A teenager has pain in her side and is finding it difficult to breathe. It could be a kidney infection or a sign of something more serious. A young woman who has had a seizure is drowsy and disorientated. As the paramedics try to find out why, the frequency of her seizures suddenly increases

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Steven is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham with multiple life-threatening injuries to his head, eye and chest after a 22-foot wall collapsed on him. Teenager Coby has crashed his motocross bike at speed, and seven-year-old Layla-Rose has fallen off her bike and smashed her front teeth

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: On the second da in Porto, bridge worker Lou takes the gang off-roading in dirt buggies before they all head out on a fancy-dress beer bike cruise. The booze and the laughs flow freely but Lou seems to have forgotten to arrange dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Village Limits in Woodhall Spa, Lincolnshire, where owner David Coulam and best friend Kim Goodman hope their quirky rooms will propel them to victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Mill in Yarm in the Tees Valley, where mother and daughter Zoe and Mea Walton hope to win over their rivals with the life of luxury. The guests are impressed, although the extra cost for the deluxe room, with its own hot tub, does not wash well with Spencer and Gavin

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals spend a night at the Elan Hotel in Rhayader, Powys, where Martin McDaid and Iris Anderson provide plenty of chat and a no-frills approach. However, Spencer and Gavin are not big fans of going back to basics, the rooms lack the wow factor for the guests and a deluge of dust leaves Spencer feeling wiped out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Royal Oak Inn, in Luxborough, Somerset, run by Spencer Braydon-Phillips, who is joined in the competition by his good friend Gavin Rees. The guests arrive to the 14th-century inn with high expectations, but are shocked to find the standards to be fairly ordinary. In the bar, competition talk turns tense and boiler troubles overnight pour cold water on the guests stays.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition finds the hosts meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. The guests rifle through their feedback, from troubles over breakfast hampers and hot tub rooms to interesting decor decisions. One hosts tit-for-tat approach also comes under scrutiny. The BandBers also get to the bottom of why one guest refused a return visit. After strong opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman jets off to Portugals Silver Coast to help mum and daughter Maria and Jess find their dream holiday home. Maria, who is originally from Lisbon, has been living in the UK for almost 40 years but now wants a holiday home that her children and grandchildren can enjoy whenever they like. With a budget of £130,000, Ben shows them five fantastic properties, but will any of them be up Maria and Jess street?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies heads to Lot-et-Garonne in south-west France to help a Hertfordshire couple find their perfect forever home on a budget of £200,000. Project manager Chris and retired teaching assistant Jane are planning a permanent move to France with their dog Loki, and theyre looking for a detached house on the edge of a small village

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Clergyman Ken is planning a permanent move to the district of Larnaca in Cyprus, and hes asked his good friend Katie to help him with the search. Hes been visiting friends in Cyprus for years and, now that hes retired from his role as a prison chaplain, he thinks its the perfect time to move closer to them. With a budget of £80,000, Jasmine Harman is tasked with finding him the perfect place. She has five properties up her sleeve but will any of them be the answer to Father Kens prayers?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Leeds, where the first to host is 24-year-old digital account manager Alice. Alice has never held a dinner party before, but shes hoping her family favourites will hit the spot and win her the £1,000 prize. Shes hoping to impress Danielle, Andy, Lynne and Matt. With gob-smacking revelations, cringe-worthy party tricks and a ginormous Pavlova, can Alice manage to walk away with the honours?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Night two of the competition in Leeds, and company director Andy hopes to win with a menu of restaurant-inspired fare, but Alice and Danielle are more impressed with his Ferrari

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fun-loving student Danielle hosts the third dinner party in Leeds, hoping a high-calorie menu will see her emerge victorious. She even serves dessert wearing her wedding dress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre technician Matt is the fourth to host in Leeds with a menu of family favourites - and if that does not win them over, hopefully his juggling skills will do the trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition in and around Leeds, and jeweller Lynne hopes her night will sparkle with a menu consisting of her own creations. While talk at the table turns to plastic surgery and Botox, Andy and Danielle arent too impressed with Lynnes food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Trap Inn in Broomhill, Northumberland, here guests take an afternoons boat trip to visit an island populated by puffins

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from Essex/Suffolk, and it is the turn of salon owner Sam to cook. She has opted for a good looking, simple menu, but foodie Chris is not impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Essex sees Polish party girl Joanna offer a taste of her homeland in a bid to win the prize. But some of the unusual flavour combinations throw her guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Deaf couple Danni and Salomon try to break through Milo the cavoodles separation anxiety, while Steve and Fiona see if theyre the right match for Bear, an abused Border collie

programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th-century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. In Italian

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer Day One - Its a Kind of Magic
programme.desc: Jewellery expert Izzie Balmer and mid-century fan Mark Hill head to Wales for the start of a new trip in Pembrokeshire. Magic tricks and a folding cake stand head to auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer Day Two - Whats Occurring in South Wales?
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill meander through the towns and villages of Carmarthenshire searching for hidden gems in an assortment of antique shops to sell at auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 3
programme.desc: The journey takes Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer through the Midlands. Starting in Royal Wootton Bassett and making their way to Cirencester, they collect treasures and trinkets in Stroud and Ashchurch. Mark becomes determined to uncover a bit of bling and finds the perfect piece in the form of a 1950s modernist pendant, plus a striking Victorian kettle designed by Dr Christopher Dresser. Izzie, meanwhile, takes a chance on some unusual Czechoslovakian glass, a Royal Worcester cup and a 19th-century food container. The pair then head off to sell their finds in Market Harborough, Leicestershire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 4
programme.desc: Jewellery afficionado Izzie Balmer and 20th-century design and glassware connoisseur Mark Hill are back on the road in their classy 1987 Lotus Éclat, scouring Oxfordshire for treasures to take to auction. Mark sweeps past a 1930s model of Davy Crockett and splashes his cash instead on a Betjeman lockable decanter, a Doulton Lambeth inkwell and most of a Shelley drip ware coffee set. Izzie invests in a Minton majolica plate for serving strawberries, a set of French boutique display boxes and a tribal African babys hood

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 5
programme.desc: The last leg of their journey sees Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill set out from Buckinghamshire seeking treasures to take to auction. Mark gets his paws on a mid-century teddy bear, while Izzie is hypnotised by early 20th-century glass commemorating Glasgows International Exhibition of 1901. Needless to say, only one of the pair can reign victorious after their final auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 3
programme.desc: The journey takes Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer through the Midlands. Starting in Royal Wootton Bassett and making their way to Cirencester, they collect treasures and trinkets in Stroud and Ashchurch. Mark becomes determined to uncover a bit of bling and finds the perfect piece in the form of a 1950s modernist pendant, plus a striking Victorian kettle designed by Dr Christopher Dresser. Izzie, meanwhile, takes a chance on some unusual Czechoslovakian glass, a Royal Worcester cup and a 19th-century food container. The pair then head off to sell their finds in Market Harborough, Leicestershire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 4
programme.desc: Jewellery afficionado Izzie Balmer and 20th-century design and glassware connoisseur Mark Hill are back on the road in their classy 1987 Lotus Éclat, scouring Oxfordshire for treasures to take to auction. Mark sweeps past a 1930s model of Davy Crockett and splashes his cash instead on a Betjeman lockable decanter, a Doulton Lambeth inkwell and most of a Shelley drip ware coffee set. Izzie invests in a Minton majolica plate for serving strawberries, a set of French boutique display boxes and a tribal African babys hood

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 5
programme.desc: The last leg of their journey sees Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill set out from Buckinghamshire seeking treasures to take to auction. Mark gets his paws on a mid-century teddy bear, while Izzie is hypnotised by early 20th-century glass commemorating Glasgows International Exhibition of 1901. Needless to say, only one of the pair can reign victorious after their final auction

Rob visits the hotels very own hi-tech recycling centre

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: What Is Dead May Never Die
programme.desc: Tyrion strengthens his position as Hand of the King with a risky gambit devised to identify the member of the small council in league with his sister Cersei, while at Winterfell, Maester Luwin tries to help Bran make sense of his dreams. Catelyn travels to the Stormlands to foster an alliance with the Baratheons, but King Renly, his new wife Margaery Tyrell and her brother Ser Loras have other plans. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb Starks chain of victories against the Lannisters enrages Joffrey, who punishes Sansa for her brothers successes. Tyrion struggles to find a way to curb his nephews cruel excesses and enlists Cerseis lover Lancel as an informant. Catelyn urges the Baratheon brothers to forgo their ambitions and unite against a common enemy, while across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys and her exhausted retinue arrive at the walled city of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Catelyn is forced to flee when the Baratheon brothers rivalry comes to a bloody end, and Lord Baelish spots an opportunity to further his own ambitions. Tyrion discovers Joffrey is planning to use a secret weapon to defend his seat of power, and Theon sails for the Stony Shore to prove his worth as a Greyjoy. Arya receives a favour from the man she freed from Harrenhal, and the Nights Watch arrives at the Fist of the First Men to stem the advance of the wildling army

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Old Gods and the New
programme.desc: King Joffreys tyrannical rule prompts the people of Kings Landing to riot, with near devastating consequences for Sansa. Meanwhile, beyond the Wall, Qhorin gives Jon a chance to prove himself. and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys resolve strengthens as she vows to reclaim what she believes is rightfully hers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theons determination to prove his Ironborn status prompts him to embark on a hunt. Daenerys receives an invitation that could prove useful to her cause, and Jaime Lannisters fortunes appear to change after a meeting with a relative among Robb Starks captives. Fantasy drama, starring Alfie Allen, Emilia Clarke and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King in the North Robb Stark is incensed when he learns he has been betrayed by one of his closest friends, while his fugitive sister Arya calls in a debt, leaving mysterious convict Jaqen Hghar with a difficult decision to make. Meanwhile, across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is presented with a dilemma as she struggles to negotiate with the seemingly egalitarian lords of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King Joffreys days on the Iron Throne appear to be numbered as Stannis lays claim to his late brother Roberts realm with a naval assault on Kings Landing. The realities of all-out war leave the young tyrant reeling, and it is left to his sharp-witted uncle Tyrion to launch a defensive strategy that could save his family and decide the fate of the seven battle-scarred kingdoms of Westeros. Jack Gleeson, Peter Dinklage and Stephen Dillane star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theon Greyjoy stirs his men into action as Maester Luwin offers some final advice, Arya receives a gift from the mysterious Jaqen, and Daenerys summons the courage to enter the House of the Undying. Meanwhile, Jon proves his worth as a brother of the Nights Watch to Qhorin Halfhand. Fantasy drama, based on George RR Martins Song of Ice and Fire novels, and starring Maisie Williams, Kit Harington and Alfie Allen

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Cob decides it is his turn to let loose, and Suzie is forced to combine dinner with her producers with Cobs wild night out. Drama, starring Billie Piper

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: On the lookout for a career change, Suzie decides to audition for a new musical. Meanwhile, family politics come to light with Suzies parents. Drama, starring Billie Piper

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: A fatal plane crash causes airline stocks to plummet. Alex harbours his own concerns when he finds terrorist websites open on his computer

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda tries to redirect Tanyas focus to her business proposal, Paula grows increasingly disillusioned with the Mossbachers, and Rachel begins to question her future

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rachel shares some harsh truths with Shane and confides in Belinda. Armond goes on an all-out bender and exacts the ultimate revenge on his nemesis

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Shae sneaks into Tyrions chamber to tell him Ros warned her about Baelishs interest in Sansa, who goes to tea with Margaery and her grandmother Lady Olenna and is encouraged to speak freely about Joffrey. Jaime passes the time by taunting his escort Brienne, Arya encounters outlaw group the Brotherhood Without Banners, while Lord Karstark makes Robb aware he no longer has faith in him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Diana Rigg

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya continues her training at the House of Black and White, Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers and the Sand Snakes mount an attack. Fantasy, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon prepares for conflict, Sansa tries to talk to Theon, and Brienne waits for a sign. Elsewhere, Jaime attempts to reconnect with his family

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya makes progress in her training, Sansa confronts an old friend, Cersei faces a struggle and Jon embarks on a journey. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Meanwhile, in Braavos, Arya runs into a familiar face and Mace Tyrell visits the Iron Bank, and against her better judgement Daenerys hosts a traditional Meereenese celebration of athleticism. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony learns there was an eyewitness to the Bevilaqua hit, so begins gathering money in case he needs to go on the run. Richie tries to persuade Junior to aid him in his plans. Carmela has a romantic encounter, and Big Pussy comes under pressure from the FBI

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is advised by his lawyer to spend time at one of his legitimate businesses - but inactivity takes its toll. Junior enjoys the company of a police officers widow, Dr Melfi gets into a public argument and Richie continues to disobey orders. Gritty drama, starring James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Edie Falco

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Margaret travels to Brooklyn for a difficult reunion with the family she left behind in Ireland, while Jimmy faces a decision that could shape the future of Atlantic City. The arrival of Daughertys new federal prosecutor leaves Van Alden weighing his options, a despairing Lucy turns to an old friend for support, and Nucky sets about promoting heavyweight boxing champion Jack Dempseys next fight

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky struggles to deal with a personal loss and seeks advice from Rothstein about his precarious political situation. Jimmy demonstrates his growing authority at Mickeys expense, while Van Alden tries to remedy his fractious relationship with Lucy by hiring a nanny. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky and Owen travel to Belfast for a meeting with the leaders of the IRA. Back in Atlantic City, Margaret grows concerned about her daughter Emilys health, anticipation builds for Jack Dempseys heavyweight title fight, and Chalkys former cellmate Dunn Purnsley organises a workers strike at the Ritz. Meanwhile, Waxey Gordon tries to bring Manny Horvitz back under control

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy is undercut by Nucky, forcing him to seek alternative sources of revenue. Margaret hopes to repent her sins by visiting a priest, Lucy deepens Van Aldens misery and the Commodores men look to end a labour dispute before the tourist season hits its peak. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky tries to prepare Margaret for the worst as she panics about the consequences of her sins - while federal prosecutor Esther Randolph gets ready to make her move. Jimmy reminisces about his days at university, Mickey Doyle is annoyed at having to share the profits of his bootlegging, and Van Aldens chequered past returns to haunt him. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky prepares for his trial, and receives an unexpected boost when his estranged protege Jimmy decides to reach out to him. However, Margaret has received an offer from Esther Randolph that could change both her life and Nuckys for ever. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow and his militant followers appear to have made an indelible mark on Kings Landing as Cersei finds herself seeking forgiveness. Meanwhile, in the North, Stannis embarks on a gruelling march, and Jon is challenged, and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is surrounded by strangers as the fifth chapter of the hit fantasy drama draws to a close. Starring Kit Harington, Emilia Clarke, Lena Headey and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fate of Jon Snow is revealed, Ramsay sends his dogs after Theon and Sansa, while Ellaria and the Sand Snakes make their move

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Bran trains with the Three-Eyed Raven, while in the north of Westeros at Castle Black, the Nights Watch stands behind Alliser Thorne. Fantasy drama, starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright and Owen Teale

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: While Daenerys meets her future, Bran meets the past. Elsewhere, Tommen confronts the High Sparrow, and Arya continues her training. Starring Emilia Clarke, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead-Wright

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clarks relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: As the first day of the trial gets underway, the prosecution presents shocking evidence. Later, Henry divulges a secret to Grace

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: As she laments her linear lifetime and the unpredictability of her soulmates appearances, the teenage Clare turns to Henry for help

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: Haley walks an ethical tightrope in her defence strategy and Grace takes measures to protect her family as the courtroom drama mounts

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fantasy drama continues as Tyrion strikes a deal, while Jorah and Daario undertake a difficult task as they seek to catch up with Daenerys. Back across the Narrow Sea, Jaime and Cersei try to improve their situation. Starring Peter Dinklage, Iain Glen, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions agenda in Slavers Bay sees him seeking a new, strange ally. In the North, Brienne goes on a mission, while in Braavos, Arya is given a chance to prove herself. Beyond the Wall, Bran makes progress with his mystical tuition, learning a great deal in the process. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Gwendoline Christie, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead Wright

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa grows in confidence under the watchful eye of the Machiavellian Lord Baelish, while Tyrion is after his just reward for the part he played in the Battle of the Blackwater. In the far North, Jon Snow is brought before formidable wildling leader Mance Rayder (Ciaran Hinds) and attempts to earn the trust of the King-beyond-the-Wall. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys Targaryen arrives in Slavers Bay with adviser Ser Jorah Mormont looking to form an army. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.sub-title: The Knight in White Satin Armour
programme.desc: Pussys loyalty to the Mob wavers and Tonys mistress puts pressure on him to continue their affair, while a domestic quarrel between Janice and Richie has a decidedly deadly outcome. James Gandolfini stars

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robbs bannermen make a declaration that threatens to throw Westeros into disarray. Catelyn confronts Jaime Lannister about Brans near-fatal fall, Arya tries to flee the capital, and Tywin sends Tyrion on a surprising assignment. Jon Snow struggles to decide where his loyalties lie, and Daenerys tries to rebuild her life after a tragic event. Fantasy drama, starring Richard Madden and Michelle Fairley

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The seven kingdoms of Westeros prepare for all-out war as newly crowned King in the North Robb Stark marches south to avenge his father. Tyrion Lannister arrives in Kings Landing to curb the excesses of teenage tyrant Joffrey, and Stannis Baratheon, brother of the late King Robert, sets his sights on the Iron Throne. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Stephen Dillane, Richard Madden, Peter Dinklage and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion turns his anger on Cersei for alienating Joffreys subjects in the wake of the capitals bloody purge, and Theon returns to the Iron Islands for first time in nine years, where he discovers his father Balon is planning to rebel against the crown once again. Arya shares a secret with her new friend Gendry while travelling north to the Wall, and Davos Seaworth recruits an ally who may prove useful in Stannis Baratheons naval invasion of Kings Landing

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. Meanwhile, Daenerys meets with the slavers as she moves to build an army. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: American Star (2024)
programme.desc: Out to kill a man he has never met, Wilson, a seasoned assassin completing his final assignment in Fuerteventura, is drawn to a ghostly shipwreck. Thriller, starring Ian McShane, Nora Arnezeder and Fanny Ardant

programme.title: The Hanging Sun (2022)
programme.desc: Fleeing from his ex-employer, John, a reluctant assassin, seeks refuge in an isolated village, where he is faced with events that test his conscience. Drama based on the Jo Nesbo novel, starring Alessandro Borghi, Jessica Brown Findlay, Peter Mullan and Charles Dance

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League (2015)
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer (2013)
programme.desc: A farm boy accidentally rebuilds the link between the human world and a kingdom of man-eating giants in the sky, resulting in a princess being trapped in the monsters realm. He joins a band of the kings knights on a rescue mission, but one of the group intends to betray them in a bid to seize the throne. Fantasy adventure, starring Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon (2024)
programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets (2022)
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog fights alongside Superman in Metropolis, thwarting the evil schemes of arch-nemesis Lex Luthor. Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthors former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter escapees to save the day. Animated comedy adventure, featuring the voices of Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Kate McKinnon, Vanessa Bayer and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie (2025)
programme.desc: Four misfits are yanked through a strange portal into a cubic realm powered by imagination. To return home, they must learn its rules and journey alongside an unlikely master crafter. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts (2015)
programme.desc: The dark knight joins forces with a team of superheroes including Green Arrow and The Flash to battle the mastermind behind a horse of deadly robotic animals. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Chris Diamantopoulos

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Im Chevy Chase and Youre Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter dives deeper into Egypts mysteries, exploring the Great Sphinx and the underground Serapeum with its precision-cut granite sarcophagi, questioning their purpose and links to the pyramid enigma. Travelling south, he visits the intricately designed Dendera Temple, where hieroglyphs and imagery hint at possible extraterrestrial connections. He concludes at the sprawling Karnak temple complex, marvelling at its monumental engineering, sphinx-lined avenues, and Hatshepsuts towering obelisk - wondering whether its simply a monument or a channel for cosmic energy

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts travels to Bamburgh, Northumberland, to learn about the generations of Anglo Saxons who lived and worked there, gaining an insight into the illnesses they suffered and the societies in which they lived. She visits the Sutton Hoo site, as well as a pioneering project in Sittingbourne, Kent, which was set up following the unearthing of an Anglo Saxon cemetery, and looks at the Staffordshire hoard discovered by a metal detector in 2009

programme.title: Combat Machines
programme.desc: A look at the machine gun, which came to dominate and even to personify the battlefields of the First World War. When operated in cool temperatures, the somewhat primitive device was able to fire 400 to 600 small-calibre rounds per minute, a figure that was to more than double by the conflicts end, with rounds fed via a fabric belt or a metal strip

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do the Brits Win Every War?
programme.desc: The year 865 saw the Great Heathen Army - the Vikings - invade Britain. Al takes up his sword to discover the truth behind how the Vikings were so successful in Britain. Guest John Thomson represents the northern Viking horde as the pair explore the truth behind what Vikings really looked like, before they get ready for a Viking wedding. programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Compilation of the most compelling mysteries featured on the Ancient Aliens series

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: The mountains of North America hide dangers that few dare to face, but in spite of everything, some men have opted for this way of life in the wilderness. Documentary following the lives of men living off the land in some of Americas most inhospitable mountain ranges

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team probes a Knight of Maltas potential Oak Island visit and captures video footage of what could be buried treasure underground

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Lets Give Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Its a long way to Murietta, and Dave is counting on his competition being unwilling to buy a big locker they need to move. Ivy and Ivy Jr find their day somewhat therapeutic, Mary finally finds a tiny treasure to take home, while Rene stands his ground to protect his honour

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Torrance, where Dave sees his profits grow - amongst other things. Mary finds clothes that dont fit her, which turns out to be a good thing. Plus, Kenny takes a chance at being an early bird, but winds up looking more like a dodo

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the sheer number of units up for auction in Rialto, Mary and Ivy wager that each can better predict final locker prices than the other. Daves locker closely resembles a chop shop, while Rene and Tatianna catch a stash of vintage sporting goods

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along, Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage, Ivy and Ivy Jr clean up with their locker, while Kenny gets some advice from a music legend. Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting whats in front of them

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Gales batter Desert Hot Springs, and the buyers do their best to keep standing. Rene and Gunther dust off an old locker, Brandi and Jarrods unit takes a turn and ends up lapping the competition, while Kenny steps up his game big time

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Not All That Glitters Is Gourd

programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts
programme.sub-title: In the Shadow of the Tor
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts embarks on an adventure across Britain to decode the truth behind its Holy Grail legends, linking Arthurian lore, sacred relics and the Knights Templar. She begins on the Isle of Wight, exploring the story of Joseph of Arimathea and the Grail. Did Joseph bury the Grail beneath the Tor? Archaeologist Cheryl Green and Dr Andrew Boakye help assess the legends historic plausibility

programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts treks across Britain, decoding the truth behind its Holy Grail legends, linking Arthurian lore, sacred relics and the Knights Templar. From the Isle of Wight to Glastonbury, Oxford, London and Scotland, she meets passionate locals, unearths legends of sacred vessels and ancient cauldrons and investigates Arthurs grave, where the trail takes an interesting turn

programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: The SS Rex, an Italian ocean liner launched in 1931. She held the westbound Blue Riband between 1933 and 1935 and later saw action in the Second World War. Seriously damaged in shallow water in 1944, she was left to rot in situ before being broken up in 1950

programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life
programme.desc: The myriad of rumours, theories and disputed historical accounts of Adolf Hitlers sexual psychology, exploring the impact of his alleged and proven sex life on his behaviour. programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: A look at the strengths, social strategies and hierarchies behind how lions and wolves in Afirca raise and protect their young

programme.title: Just Go with It (2011)
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying (2023)
programme.desc: Fran is an office worker who lives in a world of her own on the dreary Oregon coast. At home she leads a solitary, silent existence, and dreams that shes lying dead on a forest floor. Fran eventually struggles to make a connection with a friendly co-worker who takes her on a date. Comedy drama, starring Daisy Ridley, Dave Merheje and Parvesh Cheena

programme.title: Book of Love (2021)
programme.desc: Young, uptight and unsuccessful English writer Henrys latest novel sells poorly. But when the book suddenly becomes a surprise hit in Mexico, his publicist insists he travel there on a promotional tour. Upon arrival, a confused Henry discovers the reason behind the popularity - Mexican translator Maria has rewritten the dull book as a steamy erotic story. A furious Henry and reluctant Maria must now travel together on a book tour across Mexico. As tempers flair and sparks fly, the two begin to find love. Romantic comedy, starring Sam Claflin and Veronica Echegui

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureaus publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.title: The Wedding Singer (1998)
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wifes death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mothers infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fieldings novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Hugh Grant, Jim Broadbent and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Bridgets focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her babys father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days (2003)
programme.desc: A female journalist sets out to demonstrate how women manage to put off prospective partners, and spies the perfect man on whom to test her theories. However, the experiment takes an unexpected turn thanks to her guinea pig, who has a hidden agenda of his own. Romantic comedy, starring Kate Hudson, Matthew McConaughey, Adam Goldberg and Michael Michele

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice (2002)
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.title: Spanglish (2004)
programme.desc: A Mexican woman is offered a well-paid job as housekeeper to a wealthy American celebrity chef, and relocates with her daughter to Los Angeles - but her employers neurotic wife causes all sorts of problems. Comedy directed by James L Brooks, starring Paz Vega, Adam Sandler, Tea Leoni and Cloris Leachman

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)

Horror, based on Stephen Kings novel, starring Ed Harris and Max von Sydow

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: A Sheffield couple call upon Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam to help them with their bland, fake grass-clad back garden. Karen and Kathryn love to spend time outdoors - walking, reading, sunbathing, eating, playing with their dog - but desire a space less reminiscent of a football pitch. They have their hearts set on a garden with a forest feel, with informal, wandering paths and a log cabin vibe. Theyd like trees to make them feel more enclosed, a barbecue zone and a quiet, restful spot for reading. They have a healthy budget of £6,500 but even so, Flo and Charlie have their work cut out

Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: My Floating Home

They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.desc: A Sheffield couple call upon Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam to help them with their bland, fake grass-clad back garden. Karen and Kathryn love to spend time outdoors - walking, reading, sunbathing, eating, playing with their dog - but desire a space less reminiscent of a football pitch. They have their hearts set on a garden with a forest feel, with informal, wandering paths and a log cabin vibe. Theyd like trees to make them feel more enclosed, a barbecue zone and a quiet, restful spot for reading. They have a healthy budget of £6,500 but even so, Flo and Charlie have their work cut out

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: Supermarket Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Consumer show lifting the lid on secrets the major food retailers would rather keep to themselves

programme.title: The Sex Thief (1973)
programme.desc: An audacious cat burglar steals more than his female victims jewellery. Riotous early 70s comedy starring David Warbeck, Jenny Westbrook and Gerald Taylor.

programme.title: Deadly Recruits (1986)
programme.desc: Spy thriller. Promising Oxford University students are disappearing. An M15 investigation uncovers a pattern of accidents and arrests. Is the KGB involved? Terence Stamp stars.

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Setting out to bring in new livestock and expand the range of produce, the chef develops plans to add a regional staple, nut trees. Jumping over the border to Kent he discovers the cobnut before getting tips and tricks on growing his own. Back at the smallholding the raspberry bushes are in full bloom so he gets a helping hand harvesting before turning some into a special vinegar

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Catherine Southon, Gary Barton and Micaela Sharp search the Sussex town of Lewes for bargains, hoping a stethoscope, a vintage mobile and some old furniture will turn them a profit

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Hertfordshire couple Lisa and Chris dream of a child-friendly garden where they can all safely spend time together playing, growing produce and learning about nature. However, their garden is currently a ramshackle spot with a treacherous patio, a troublesome lawn, a huge concrete pad and no real character. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill design and build a practical, productive space to meet the needs of the family on a £3,000 budget

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Setting out to bring in new livestock and expand the range of produce, the chef develops plans to add a regional staple, nut trees. Jumping over the border to Kent he discovers the cobnut before getting tips and tricks on growing his own. Back at the smallholding the raspberry bushes are in full bloom so he gets a helping hand harvesting before turning some into a special vinegar

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The autumn sales are over and preparations are being made for winter. In Newtonmore in Cairngorms National Park, Robert MacKenzie needs to gather in all his cows back down to the croft for pregnancy testing, while on North Uist, the MacDonalds are harvesting potatoes grown in the sandy machair soil unique to the west of Scotland

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The Barclays are finding their feet with their new business, which involves buying lambs to fatten up for the butcher. Rachel and Camy, who are one year into their tenancy, set off to market at Lairg to buy more ewes, while Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The MacDonalds walk their 150 pregnant Highland cattle from the mainland of North Uist to the tidal island of Vallay, which is accessible by foot for only a six-hour window. In the Cairngorms National Park, Jenni is planning for the year ahead with her fledgling alpaca-trekking business, and has decided a trio of pygmy goats is the perfect addition to the menagerie

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: In North Uist, Fraser and Carianne set off for the mainland to sell their rams and buy new ones ready for mating season. They dont always agree on which is best, and the best dont always prove their worth. The Barclays of South Ayrshire prepare their sheep for the Lanark Winter Show, while Nikki and Ollie begin their latest venture - farming rabbits to sell to a local hotel restaurant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner in South Ayrshire, a deep freeze descends on Johns farm, creating havoc with the machinery and forcing him to cancel his glamping pod guests. On top of all that, imports of foreign lamb threaten profit margins for his lamb fattening business. In Moray, Nikki and Ollie pick up a big order from their local butcher. Theyre showcasing and selling their buffalo meat and other home-grown produce at a Christmas farmers market

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Hertfordshire couple Lisa and Chris dream of a child-friendly garden where they can all safely spend time together playing, growing produce and learning about nature. However, their garden is currently a ramshackle spot with a treacherous patio, a troublesome lawn, a huge concrete pad and no real character. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill design and build a practical, productive space to meet the needs of the family on a £3,000 budget

programme.title: The Dirty Heroes (1967)
programme.desc: As the final battles of the Second World War rage, a band of ex-convicts embarks on a mission in occupied Holland to recover a cache of stolen diamonds and top secret Allied plans that have fallen into Nazi hands. Action adventure, starring Frederick Stafford, Daniela Bianchi, John Ireland and Curt Jurgens

programme.title: Sex Clinic (1972)
programme.desc: A nurse runs a clinic that secretly provides sexual services for people with unusual kinks - but she also blackmails her unwitting clients. Her carefree life is complicated by her relationship with another woman and an unexpected run-in with her estranged son. Drama, starring Georgina Ward and Alexander Davion

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumbers Mate (1978)
programme.desc: An amorous plumber runs up against assorted crooks and low-lifes while searching for a golden toilet seat. Sex comedy, starring Christopher Neil, Arthur Mullard and Elaine Paige

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled en route to the contemplation garden, giving Jack plenty to think about as he tries to figure out which member of the group was responsible. To add to the DIs problems, he is struggling to come up with a speech to honour Commissioner Patterson at an award ceremony. Caribbean whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon

Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: Crime caper set in Newfoundland, Canada, revolving around the special partnership between dedicated detective Charlie Hudson and his extraordinary former K9 dog Rex. programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: As Alexas birthday approaches, Kieran gives her an early present - the case of a plastic surgeon obsessed with getting her own cosmetic procedures who died after self-administering an anti-wrinkle drug she had developed. Detective drama, starring Lucy Lawless and Bernard Curry

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal OHanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JPs past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The team is called in when a plastinated nervous system is found hanging above a car dealership. Chavez and Max search for a missing source in their ongoing investigation.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The celebratory launch of a new luxury resort is cut short when a woman is found electrocuted in her hotel bathtub - with the door locked from the inside. It looks like a simple case of suicide, but with Jack Mooney no longer around to confirm Commissioner Selwyns suspicions, DI Neville Parker is temporarily flown over from Manchester to close the case. However, he soon realises that island life is not for him, so when evidence of suspicious activity turns up, he is dismayed to realise he will have to extend his stay and investigate the case as murder. Ralf Little joins the cast, with guest appearances by Steve Pemberton and Samantha Bond
